item.title: MIUI OS2.0.204.0.VMGRUXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 12 4G NFC Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 12 4G NFC Russia

Codename: topaz

Version: OS2.0.204.0.VMGRUXM | 15.0

Size: 7.6 GB

MD5: ad2ee3511cab2490d83df29279a6d627

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.
